pi_items.verified_value: 5 external entities: Patron, Librarian, Publisher/Vendor, OCLC/WorldCat, SIP2 Kiosk

koha_system_spec.txt (lines 30-63) defines 7 processes (P1-P7); verified against real Koha module documentation

pi_items.verified_value: 5 data stores: Biblio Catalog, Patron Database, Transaction Log, Acquisitions Ledger, Serials Registry
pi_items.source: koha_system_spec.txt (lines 67-71) lists 5 compound-named stores; task.json description specifies these 5 store names

pi_items.verified_value: Koha is a real, open-source integrated library system with documented modules for Circulation, Cataloging, Acquisitions, OPAC, Serials, Patron Management, and Reporting
pi_items.source: Web search results confirm Koha ILS has these exact modules; Koha Community documentation verified

pi_items.verified_value: Koha supports SIP2 protocol for self-service kiosks and can integrate with OCLC WorldCat for bibliographic records
pi_items.source: Web search results for 'Koha OCLC WorldCat SIP2 integration' confirm both integrations are real capabilities

privileged_info_summary: The task describes a DFD for Koha Integrated Library System, a real open-source ILS. The system specification file is created synthetically by the task setup but accurately reflects real Koha modules: Circulation, Cataloging, Acquisitions, OPAC, Patron Management, Serials, and Reports. The spec correctly identifies 5 data stores (Biblio Catalog, Patron Database, Transaction Log, Acquisitions Ledger, Serials Registry) and 5 external entities (Patron, Librarian, Publisher/Vendor, OCLC/WorldCat, SIP2 Kiosk). Koha documentation confirms support for SIP2 self-service kiosks and OCLC/WorldCat integration. The metadata's expected_entities list breaks compound entity names into 8 individual keywords (contradicting the 5 entities listed in spec), and expected_stores similarly breaks 5 compound store names into 6 individual keywords rather than listing the actual store names.
